ideation: This sequence will mimic a frog's posture, starting with a crouched position and ending with a jump. The arms will move accordingly to enhance the effect. Frame 1: The robot is in a crouched position, arms bent. Frame 2: The robot is mid-crouch, arms extended forward. Frame 3: The robot is fully extended upwards. Frame 4: The robot returns to a relaxed pose.

frames.beat: arms crouch low, ready to spring
arms shoot up, launching into the air
arms return to a relaxed, resting state
